purpose: Machine-readable contract for the MAS-owned stage terminal decision that lets OPL route a paper mission without inferring medical quality from runtime completion.
machine_boundary: PaperMissionTransaction is the transaction boundary between an OPL StageRun and MAS paper authority. OPL may carry the transaction, retry/resume the StageRun, and consume opl_route_command, but only MAS can author stage_terminal_decision, paper audit evidence, owner decision packet, typed blocker request, or human gate request. This contract cannot write publication_eval/latest.json, controller_decisions/latest.json, owner receipts, typed blockers, human gates, current_package, runtime queues, provider attempts, or Yang authority surfaces.

stage_terminal_decision.role: The authoritative MAS decision emitted at the end of a paper stage. OPL consumes this instead of guessing next stage from provider completion or read-model status.

opl_route_command.role: Runtime carrier command derived from the MAS terminal decision. It is not a medical quality verdict.

paper_audit_pack_refs.role: Refs that prove stage terminalization was based on paper artifacts and expert-auditable evidence families.

idempotency.role: OPL retries and resume may replay the carrier, but MAS terminal decision consumption must remain keyed by this identity.
